scope.summary: DI2 clamps oracle_preview_dml witness rows to the enforced query ceiling and publishes that ceiling in the tool schema.
out_of_scope: No live Oracle preview_dml run is claimed; this close is pinned by the dispatcher/runtime clamp and registry schema unit tests.
No changes to dashboard HTTP operator files or session-recycle paths are included.

entry_points.name: oracle_preview_dml runtime witness row clamp
entry_points.trace: crates/oraclemcp/src/dispatch/mod.rs:9069-9071 clamps requested witness rows into 1..=MAX_QUERY_MAX_ROWS, and preview_dml_inner uses that clamped value for QueryCaps before producing witness_rows.

entry_points.name: oracle_preview_dml public schema maximum
entry_points.trace: crates/oraclemcp/src/registry.rs publishes max_rows with a finite maximum matching the enforced MAX_QUERY_MAX_ROWS ceiling, so clients see the same upper bound the runtime enforces.

entry_points.name: cargo test -p oraclemcp --lib preview_witness_max_rows_is_clamped_at_the_query_ceiling -- --nocapture
entry_points.trace: Re-run after source verification on 2026-07-22: 1 passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored. The test covers usize::MAX, over-ceiling values, zero-to-one lower clamp, default behavior, and exact ceiling.

entry_points.name: cargo test -p oraclemcp --lib preview_dml_schema_publishes_the_enforced_row_ceiling -- --nocapture
entry_points.trace: Re-run on 2026-07-22: 1 passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored. The test verifies the registry schema publishes the enforced ceiling.

entry_points.name: git diff --quiet 3fa4fc06a7bfb946dc6ad6aea7f6b08b344e4057..332c2c658d259babcd976e32084313b045d3b8b7 -- crates/oraclemcp/src/dispatch/mod.rs crates/oraclemcp/src/registry.rs
entry_points.trace: Exit 0: HEAD advanced during verification only via tracker sync; the DI2 source content at evidence HEAD is identical to the source content tested.

limitations: Scoped-test close only; no full workspace gate or live Oracle preview witness run is claimed.
The shared checkout had unrelated dirty files outside this scope; the scoped source paths and evidence files were clean before this evidence was written.
